GitHubApiData.name: CleanArchitecture
GitHubApiData.description: An example of how to implement various clean coding & architecture techniques.  Technologies used: .Net Core, Razor Pages, EF Core, Bootstrap 4

TranslatedDescriptions.zh-CN: 展示如何实现多种清洁编码与架构技术的示例。使用技术：.Net Core、Razor Pages、EF Core、Bootstrap 4。
TranslatedDescriptions.ja: さまざまなクリーンコーディングおよびアーキテクチャ技法の実装例。使用技術：.Net Core、Razor Pages、EF Core、Bootstrap 4
TranslatedDescriptions.en: An example demonstrating the implementation of various clean coding and architecture techniques. Technologies used: .Net Core, Razor Pages, EF Core, Bootstrap 4.
TranslatedDescriptions.ko: 다양한 클린 코딩 및 아키텍처 기법을 구현하는 예제입니다. 사용 기술: .Net Core, Razor Pages, EF Core, Bootstrap 4
TranslatedDescriptions.es: Un ejemplo de cómo implementar diversas técnicas de código limpio y arquitectura. Tecnologías utilizadas: .Net Core, Razor Pages, EF Core, Bootstrap 4
TranslatedDescriptions.fr: Un exemple d'implémentation de diverses techniques de clean coding et d'architecture. Technologies utilisées : .Net Core, Razor Pages, EF Core, Bootstrap 4.
